payload.label: window
payload.long_description: White-painted arched window with interior horizontal blinds partially closed; blinds show several bent slats and a frosted/blurred patch in the center, set under a brown arched valance with minor wear at the side edges, full window visible in crop with exterior scene faintly visible beyond — estimated ~3.0 meters from camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white arched window with blinds","long_description":"White-painted arched window with interior horizontal blinds partially closed; blinds show several bent slats and a frosted/blurred patch in the center, set under a brown arched valance with minor wear at the side edges, full window visible in crop with exterior scene faintly visible beyond — estimated ~3.0 meters from camera.","attributes":["white painted frame","arched top","horizontal blinds","blinds partially closed","bent/damaged slats","frosted/blurred center patch","brown valance/top","minor wear/peeling at sides","interior view to exterior"],"distance_from_camera_m":3.0}
